project.name: TaskTracker
project.description: A task management app for small teams.

issues.title: User Registration
issues.description: Given a visitor, when they submit email and password, then system creates account and returns 201.

issues.title: User Login
issues.description: Given a registered user, when they submit valid credentials, then system returns JWT tokens.

issues.title: Create Task
issues.description: Given an authenticated user, when they POST a task title, then system creates task and returns 201.

issues.title: Unlabelled story
issues.description: Some story with no label assigned.
